message:
🌱 Add containerd: ExecStartPre=/sbin/modprobe fails inside LXC  mission (#1540)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "containerd-2772-execstartpre-sbin-modprobe-fails-inside-lxc",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "containerd: ExecStartPre=/sbin/modprobe fails inside LXC ",
+    "description": "ExecStartPre=/sbin/modprobe fails inside LXC . This issue affects 8+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify containerd troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your containerd deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review containerd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant containerd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd\nkubectl get configmap -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=containerd\n```\n**Description**\n\nRunning Debian 9.5 in a LXC container. Upgraded `docker-ce` to `5:18.09.0~3-0~debian-stretch`, which pulls `containerd.io` version `1.2.0-1`.\n\n1."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for ExecStartPre=/sbin/modprobe fails inside LXC ",
+        "description": "The packaging for docker ce/ee would go into ~~https://github.com/docker/containerd-packaging/blob/master/common/containerd.service#L7~~ sorry, just realised that repo isn't public; content looks the same as is in this repository though :smile:\n\n> It looks like adding a `-` to the ExecStartPre command is something we can easily do it our service file \n\nOh, TIL (https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=651797#c2)\n\n> If you prepend the path with a dash the result will be ignored:\n>\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm ExecStartPre=/sbin/modprobe fails inside LXC  is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n containerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The packaging for docker ce/ee would go into ~~https://github.com/docker/containerd-packaging/blob/master/common/containerd.service#L7~~ sorry, just realised that repo isn't public; content looks the same as is in this repository though :smile:\n\n> It looks like adding a `-` to the ExecStartPre command is something we can easily do it our service file \n\nOh, TIL",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
